payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Partial rectangular pillow with horizontal blue, gray and white stripes on a smooth woven pillowcase, edge-cropped on the right side of the image and lying flat on a bed surface; appears to be photographed from close range (approximately 0.6–0.8 m away).
